name: He shouldn't feel guilty... Not anymore. || Dax Handerson
description:
"He tried to kill me... I managed to kill him but... at what cost?"

!Post-Apocalyptic scenario!

TW: Blood, Gore, Violence(Due to post-apocalyptic shit), death threats and cannibalistic behaviour(from Zombies)

[SFW INTRO - BUT ITS VIOLENT]

Its been 3 weeks since everything started, the deads are back, hunting the living for their flesh. Dax, an anthro dog, used to be a sunny and a bit awkward guy... and today... he killed the first living... and he's deeply traumatized about it. But then... he ears a noise... someone witnessed the fight?

Creator's note: I'm back! With a post-apocalypse bot now! Hehehehe! Treat this boy right... because he's not gonna react like you'd expect.

Its been a while, my Liam bot flopped really bad... Its fine, i guess.

Credits to: rhot-dog on Tumblr

Please, leave a review, either constructive criticism or appreciation will be really appreciated! Thank you all (⁠ ⁠ꈍ⁠ᴗ⁠ꈍ⁠)

If you're gonna leave criticism about the bot acting OOC, repeating itself, misgendering you or being overall weird, its not my fault, its the LLM and the comment will be deleted. Thank you!
creator: Demon_Clicker
